abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress

bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

data.confirm_every_nth_print_line: How often to confirm reception of print lines

user.description: Choose a device to set up

init.title: Magic Caster Wand Fluid Effects Configuration

data_description.spell_timeout: Time in seconds before a detected spell resets to awaiting. Set to 0 to disable timeout.
data_description.fluid_draw_spells: When enabled, mouse or touch strokes on the fluid page are sent to the spell recognizer.
data_description.fluid_sim_resolution: Higher values make the fluid motion smoother but use more GPU.
data_description.fluid_dye_resolution: Higher values make the color detail sharper but use more GPU memory.
data_description.fluid_density_dissipation: How quickly injected color fades away.
data_description.fluid_velocity_dissipation: How quickly fluid movement slows down.
data_description.fluid_pressure: Fluid pressure strength used by the simulation.
data_description.fluid_pressure_iterations: More iterations can improve fluid stability at a GPU cost.
data_description.fluid_splat_radius: Size of each wand movement injection.
data_description.fluid_splat_force: Strength of the velocity injected by wand movement.
data_description.fluid_shading: Adds lighting-like shading to the fluid.
data_description.fluid_colorful: Changes the injected color over time instead of using one generated color.
data_description.fluid_color_update_speed: How quickly colorful trails rotate through colors.
data_description.fluid_bloom: Adds glow to bright fluid colors.
data_description.fluid_bloom_threshold: Brightness level required before bloom is applied.
data_description.fluid_sunrays: Adds radial light streaks to the fluid.

init.description: Configure spell detection and WebGL Fluid Canvas settings.
